summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SPETAP multi-tenant SaaS platform after Tailwind CSS fix. All features tested successfully.

bugs_fixed.issue: Login redirect route mismatch - backend returned /owner/dashboard but frontend only had /owner route
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed next_route from '/owner/dashboard' to '/owner' for owner role

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - existing test user used
context_for_next_testing_agent: SPETAP is a multi-tenant venue operations SaaS. Tailwind CSS with token-based theming is working correctly. @tailwind directives present in index.css. Light/dark mode uses data-theme attribute. Auth uses MongoDB, tested with teste@teste.com/teste123. Backend connected to both MongoDB and PostgreSQL.
features_tested: ✅ Login page renders correctly with styled card, purple button, Inter font
✅ Login flow works with credentials teste@teste.com / teste123
✅ PulseEntry page displays full-width layout with 12-column grid
✅ Purple primary color applied to: active tab, icons, focus ring, Manual Entry circle
✅ Dark mode toggle works on PulseEntry page
✅ Dark mode toggle works on Login page
✅ No hardcoded colors - all interactive elements use token-based colors
